case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JULIANA COUTINHO DA GAMA

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2019 - AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE COURT CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING TO JUN-28-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DA GAMA, JULIANA COUTINHO $2,496.30 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,601.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4/26/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO MAIL RECEPTACLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED MAR-18-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DA GAMA, JULIANA COUTINHO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,496.30 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DA GAMA, JULIANA COUTINHO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JULIANA COURTINHO DA GAMA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2019 - JUDGMENT.
